mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT res.* FROM sys_resource res JOIN sys_role_resource rr ON res.id = rr.resource_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rr.role_code = ur.role_code JOIN sys_role role ON ur.role_code = role.role_code AND role.status = 1 WHERE ur.username = #{username} AND res.status = 1 ORDER BY res.sort_order ASC
SELECT res.* FROM sys_resource res JOIN sys_role_resource rr ON res.id = rr.resource_id WHERE rr.role_code = #{roleCode} AND res.status = 1
